data.title: Gold Royalty Corp. acquires additional Borborema royalty on gold mine and property. NYSE: GROY. Jan. 14, 2026.
data.description: In Vancouver, British Columbia, on January 14, 2026, Gold Royalty Corp. revealed that it will be acquiring a net smelter royalty on the Borborema gold mine and property. The company, traded on NYSE American as GROY, shared this exciting news of the agreement. The specifics of the deal, including financial details and terms, were not disclosed in the announcement.

data.title: StraighterLine partners with Point Park University to offer low-cost online courses for college credit. Arlington, VA - Jan. 14, 2026.
data.description: A partnership has been formed between StraighterLine, an online education platform facilitating virtual college courses for credit transfer, and Point. This collaboration aims to enhance flexible and on-demand learning opportunities. The announcement was made in Arlington, Va., on January 14, 2026.

data.title: Dundee Corporation sells Borborema Gold Project royalty for $45 million to Gold Royalty Corp. in cash and common shares.
data.description: In Toronto on January 14, 2026, Dundee Corporation (TSX: DC.A) announced a significant development by entering a Royalty Purchase Agreement with Gold Royalty Corp. (GROY) to sell its net smelter royalty in the Borborema Gold Project. The deal involves a total purchase price of US$45 million, which includes US$30 million in cash and US$15 million in common shares of GROY. The shares will be issued at a rate of US$4.20 per share, reflecting the 20-day volume weighted average price of GROY common shares before the agreement was signed. The completion of this transaction, subject to standard conditions, is anticipated to be finalized in January 2026.

data.title: Bank of America discloses Q4 2025 financial results in CHARLOTTE, NC. Full details at Bank of America's website and SEC's site.
data.description: In Charlotte, North Carolina, on January 14, 2026, Bank of America released its financial results for the fourth quarter of 2025. Interested parties can view the news release, supplemental filing, and investor presentation on Bank of America's Investor Relations website. The information can be accessed at https://investor.bankofamerica.com/quarterly-earnings. Additionally, a Form 8-K containing the detailed financial results is available on the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission's website. Further information can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Travere Therapeutics (NASDAQ: TVTX) stock falls after FDA delays review of key kidney drug, Filspari, for FSGS. PDUFA target action date extended to April 13 following submission of responses. Stock decline amidst mixed market performance.
data.description: Travere Therapeutics, Inc. stock (NASDAQ: TVTX) dropped due to selling pressure post a concerning corporate update. The broader market showed mixed performance, with S&P 500 down by 0.16% and Nasdaq slightly up by 0.02%. FDA extended the review timeline for Travere's Filspari in FSGS, setting a new PDUFA action date on April 13. This extension followed additional information requests to further demonstrate clinical benefits of Filspari, without querying its safety or manufacturing. Travere shared their preliminary financial results mentioning FDA's requests for additional information on Filspari's clinical benefits and submission of responses. Investors were wary due to these developments on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Visa teams up with BVNK for stablecoin payouts, allowing businesses to send and receive Visa Direct payments using stablecoins in certain markets.
data.description: Businesses will now be able to use stablecoins to fund and receive Visa Direct payouts in certain markets, enhancing the convenience and flexibility of transactions. This integration will allow for seamless processing of payments, with a focus on providing efficient and secure financial services. This new feature is set to revolutionize the way businesses make and receive payments, with a potential increase in the use of stablecoins for transactions.

data.title: Dell is revamping operations with a major overhaul to unlock AI potential, launching single enterprise platform on May 3.
data.description: In an internal memo, Dell Technologies Inc. (NYSE: DELL) COO and Vice Chairman, Jeff Clarke, has announced a significant overhaul dubbed One Dell Way. This transformation, deemed the largest in company history, will standardize processes and introduce a unified enterprise platform on May 3. The initiative aims to replace multiple applications and databases to streamline operations and data unification. Dell has yet to respond to Benzinga's request for comment on the development. For more details, the complete story is accessible on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Delphi Digital predicts Perp DEXs will surpass Traditional Finance by 2026, despite lower trading volumes currently.
data.description: Decentralized exchanges, known as DEXs, are currently managing only a small portion of the trading volume when compared to traditional finance (TradFi) investments. However, the technology and systems supporting DEXs are advancing rapidly to match the pace of the sluggish and disjointed centralized trading platforms.

data.title: ADAS Simulation Market to reach $9.66B by 2032 with 14.3% CAGR, up from $3.79B in 2025 | MarketsandMarkets™.
data.description: In Delray Beach, Florida, as of January 14, 2026, it has been reported that the ADAS simulation market is anticipated to witness significant growth. Research from MarketsandMarkets™ reveals that the market is set to increase from USD 3.79 billion in 2025 to USD 9.66 billion by 2032, indicating a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 14.3%. The study includes extensive market data with 174 tables and 90 figures incorporated across 298 pages.

data.title: WSPN introduces stablecoin-based trade finance for JOC Australia Pty Ltd with asset-backed digital bills of lading.
data.description: On January 14, 2026, WSPN, a prominent provider of regulated stablecoin infrastructure based in Tortola, British Virgin Islands, revealed a significant development. They launched stablecoin-denominated trade finance backed by assets to assist JOC Australia Pty Ltd, an Australian commodity exporter. This deployment marks a milestone for WSPN and signifies their commitment to providing innovative financial solutions.

data.title: By 2026, Perp DEXs projected to surpass traditional finance, despite handling only a fraction of its trading volume.
data.description: Decentralized exchanges (DEXs) currently account for only a small portion of trading compared to traditional finance (TradFi) investments. However, their technology is rapidly improving to compete with the inefficient and fragmented centralized trading platforms.

data.title: DataCamp to offer free AI training to 1M teachers & students globally by 2026, in collaboration with the Mark Cuban Foundation.
data.description: A major announcement was made in New York as DataCamp committed to providing free artificial intelligence training to one million teachers and students across the globe by 2026. This initiative includes an enhanced collaboration with the Mark Cuban Foundation.
